summary: Iteration 23 - Academic Session Feature Testing Complete. All backend APIs pass (16/16 tests). Frontend UI verified: Login page shows session dropdown with 2016-17 to 2025-26, auto-selects current session (2025-26), Super Admin has session switcher with 'All Sessions' option, Branch Admin has read-only session badge. Dashboard data correctly filters by session.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration23_sessions.py - New test file for session feature

session_api_endpoint.details: GET /api/auth/sessions returns list of sessions from 2016-17 to 2025-26, includes current_session field

login_with_session.details: Login accepts session parameter, returns session in response, defaults to current session (2025) when not provided

login_page_session_dropdown.details: Login page shows Academic Session dropdown with sessions from 2016-17 to 2025-26, auto-selects current session (2025-26)

super_admin_session_switcher.details: Super Admin sees session switcher dropdown in header, includes 'All Sessions' option, can switch between sessions

branch_admin_session_badge.details: Branch Admin sees read-only session badge in header (no switcher dropdown)

leads_api_session_filter.details: GET /api/leads?session=2024 returns 0 leads, session=2025 returns 8 leads, session=all returns 8 leads

dashboard_data_filtering.details: Dashboard data changes when Super Admin switches sessions - 2024-25 shows 0 leads/enrollments, 2025-26 shows actual data

session_header_support.details: APIs accept session via X-Academic-Session header in addition to query parameter

context_for_next_testing_agent: Academic session feature fully implemented and tested. Sessions run April to March (e.g., session 2024 = April 2024 - March 2025). Super Admin can switch sessions and view All Sessions. Other roles locked to their selected session. All data (leads, enrollments, payments) is filtered by session.
